entries.thesis: HIMS is a GLP-1 market leader with accelerating revenue growth and telehealth platform providing competitive moat. Q2 earnings on Aug 10 are the catalyst. WEAK_BUY signal has 79% historical win rate. Position sized at 10% based on conviction.
